textByHashes.b56ef46d8cfeb33e309cb9e6308021ebde4aa7dc: What do you want guard? I'm a busy man.
textByHashes.87871b270da9387a4f73958b1f9439440df903e5: In the last two hundred years, I have survived all horrors imaginable. Now it is my turn to cover this land in darkness. One day you shall see, all will quake on hearing my name.
textByHashes.3362532cd2ef0ef600ca7041f4bfab672934acbd: Who dares enter my home? You? A feeble traveller?
textByHashes.2aa0022f62774bc4c8d356690cd80db218d97736: Get out! Whoever let you in shall be severely punished for this.
textByHashes.a8652ea8fd2ba457826256d50a101164e1b552a6: [laugh], well done, well done that was rather entertaining. I am the great General Khazard, and the two men you just 'saved' are my property.
textByHashes.4511f32efc1637f48e2299c812c6f05e8f078deb: Well, I suppose we could find some arrangement for their freedom... hmmm?
textByHashes.f5022713ebbb1e690ccc874158a353879b483ee8: I'll let them go, but you must stay and fight for me. You'll make me double the gold if you manage to last a few fights.
textByHashes.d820058cee4cba24f9ac7a8dc2776ea9453f1736: Guards! Take him to the cells.
textByHashes.faf1bd8eed73bbf29121249701f2847d0ef69aa3: Guards! Take her to the cells.
textByHashes.f73cb25f678836081081eeb83bb4299a29a9356f: Why would I give them up, those two men are my property now.
textByHashes.e4f52285430c37ac7669157fe16a5d67001d7a3e: How dare you speak to me, you are a slave of this arena now.
textByHashes.05d9c42c63f33ee54ebd7da979c1a304de7e65f2: Not bad, not bad at all. I think you need a tougher challenge. Time for my puppy. Guards! Guards! Bring on Bouncer!
textByHashes.0d1120737160f4c05376774416d35eb92de339ca: Nooooo! Bouncer! How dare you? You've taken the life of my only friend. Now you'll suffer traveller, prepare to meet your maker.
textByHashes.bda61b09cc93600d2c0cf4f844e98f9f78607887: Indeed. I obviously underestimated you, although you still pale in comparison to the might of General Khazard.
textByHashes.9753e370f12c123e602288d50580c839ff63baac: You shall see that I am not cowardly enough to make false promises. They may go.
textByHashes.6564d6a041206ab48ec610bdbf85e50b201b43b8: You however have caused me much trouble today. You must remain here so that I may at least have the pleasure of killing you myself.
textByHashes.07c0ec52bee662bd3b7f2d862cd8c66eff5a8836: The agreement was that the Servils may leave if you won a few fights, and indeed they are now free to do so.
textByHashes.224bef747fb615db73428d695d034c90ac4acfd8: You killed my pet, and yet still you dare to speak to me?
textByHashes.08344fd188d85d95dc03e2f43a18bf5a0e24c9a2: You shall die for your insolence.
textByHashes.0d8d0a33fe67d3fc25f878166a31e30f005dc75c: Well, well, well, you seem to be in quite the rush. Do you have somewhere else to be?
textByHashes.689edf1dc34dfd1a17f8d2f00401e27b2ab2cfdc: You presume correct. I must say, I sense a great air of defiance to you. Does my appearance not fill you with fear?
textByHashes.0c1460f9b743f0886d819d42d34bb167d4099cea: How arrogant. No matter though, you will come to learn.
textByHashes.d5e2c50757650a1dd53e07f375d82f7014824245: Now, despite your entertaining show, the two individuals you are attempting to leave with are my property.
textByHashes.d21d437f2ae3717a288a45fd3fac4d4144aea920: Ha! Well if their freedom is so valuable to you, how about a trade? Fight in my arena, and if you win, I'll let them go.
textByHashes.ac3bea81a4b00798e8665e03e0ab49a398dbcbf7: Well... I wasn't actually giving you a choice. Guards, take him to the cells.
textByHashes.0c2caef6ad2447d798659260ca873dd8de557c95: Well... I wasn't actually giving you a choice. Guards, take her to the cells.
textByHashes.6db636f3e7bbd9c700f3bb779ec290855afdcd51: Well... I wasn't actually giving you a choice. Guards, take them to the cells.
textByHashes.7c7473fc1f387cb4b9780e5522db2361bca81ef7: Now watch closely, friends. I fear this may be where your protector dies.
textByHashes.eef52c093be6b4f636b7eef52bdabe59d299f836: Impressive, but now for a proper challenge. Time for my puppy. Bring on Bouncer!
textByHashes.d7bf3e23e7d977e9d704d2c3a73a567c52f16c53: You monster! You'll pay for what you've done!
textByHashes.04e4d8b39c46f337f60622ea548331532032fa0a: Fine! I am not a coward who makes false promises. I have no need of them anyway. You on the other hand, won't be going anywhere.
textByHashes.b74822fccb2fb5415ed92e19da41938445b19394: Guard, escort the Servils out. I'll take great pleasure in dealing with this one myself!
textByHashes.b59f63e7e690d0df4c6c3c617c6754430a5e5f9d: Ha! Arrogant fool! You think you can kill me? I am General Khazard! My power is absolute!
textByHashes.4649db944e3c21dc8aac6584fc5fe7177c66e242: Now, part of me would very much like to kill you for what you've done today, but let it be known that I am not without generosity.
textByHashes.0a00aec24b6e68bd53a5370f397a032472cf3f2f: You proved yourself in battle against me. That is something few can boast of. For that, you may leave. However, if you ever oppose me again, I won't hesitate to wipe you from existence!
textByHashes.8c627a9f30630e243f3d867e74d70b6b7ad8b121: Now go. I have business to attend to elsewhere that is far more important than you.
textByHashes.90f3c9e42ace19cd9fac80203009040be37f17f2: Disappointed? I have no reason to be disappointed.
textByHashes.155dd8c6ba8fd773f779ce6f18524bdad00534d5: They were our lands! And... hang on... what is this human filth doing here?
textByHashes.e2261b59cdeebede73eaa8eac0ec9f05a9fd9b98: It's clear that I've allowed you to endure for far too long! Allow me to correct that mistake.
textByHashes.be3a6d70bba57359c05afd4f057f98751ae49060: Then kill him and let's investigate. Or has your sleep made you go soft?
textByHashes.da93c5779cf0c59a0b0586b4f7ad988be3d3d8ef: Then kill her and let's investigate. Or has your sleep made you go soft?
textByHashes.f08e2d81e46524e9de94249f99fa99bb5fcdf758: Fine, but I hope you know this is a foolish idea. What is the information he presented?
textByHashes.5372f68add4412195bbf143e54bb482cc7f0bddf: Fine, but I hope you know this is a foolish idea. What is the information she presented?
textByHashes.3e15d9f2227cefe566726038476be8f025aab78d: Hazeel? What is the meaning of this? And what is this human filth doing here?
textByHashes.75c2a05174ea087b448202bfd3f4de6fefb567e3: Has the once great Hazeel gone soft? Never would I have expected you to work with scum like this. I trust you know that he'll betray you?
textByHashes.8c762fd4a396d55044465b4f591d18ebfe44c0b6: Has the once great Hazeel gone soft? Never would I have expected you to work with scum like this. I trust you know that she'll betray you?
textByHashes.3f13eeafe6fe66e3b84990a2ebdfd1966186198f: Fine, but I hope you have good reason for this.
textByHashes.eabf24f849c994d65d7e549d0fe2c420b39bc018: I don't involve myself in the personal affairs of my soldiers. Besides, I'd have thought you'd be happy to see that fool dead.
textByHashes.1d14df9a95e52d0bf47da8c7a98f434e302ce330: Bah! This matter is beneath the both of us. Accept this for the gift it is and move on.
textByHashes.1fcb7422537e48675eb50034dde0258b633db984: You're trusting him with this? Stop this madness and let me handle it instead.
textByHashes.6385e18038a96b30648ed639fd50dfea584aa9f8: You're trusting her with this? Stop this madness and let me handle it instead.
textByHashes.aa7e8e7498170a7ff9908f1ba5c36768aea6cbf1: Continue to bother me and I'll make you history. Now go away.
textByHashes.24b5d152e83104a916b3218617279d7c8090c3b6: Half a crest? Could that be...?
textByHashes.9816e7355e56216303656cadc8b1f850f71e162d: So that was their true target. But I thought it was lost... How did it get there?
textByHashes.a7e5f15ab780d61115b783659162a383d6436630: Who would even want to steal that thing? One of our kin, perhaps?
textByHashes.7a256e75fec163bb158dc64d38f2ca3d070292ba: Something is still amiss in all of this.
textByHashes.0cee4acc13d61f45e6c143a71e98a902da215a08: We should not waste any time. However, we must first deal with the human.
textByHashes.b4d2816e2035d84911cc058ca53b30f1e91f0b1b: A group of ice trolls have made their home near the fortress. I will join you there.
textByHashes.ac33470ba3cffbf6ba3e8e791c8733effa9ccc00: Nobody cares! Be gone from our sight.
textByHashes.dda826c1ca0ad81dde8d0a561143a77efc367a4f: Why? We can make short work of any trolls that disturb us. We have no need for dead weight.
textByHashes.5df9b1c5a40f5c68014899e5ea2a81bc2465c3c6: Enough of this nonsense! If you want subtlety, we can use the Shadow Realm.
textByHashes.1b9b8e11b47fd0f1550e11234b1f186acbe3f0ec: Fine, but on your head be it if this goes wrong.
textByHashes.e44c9e1627d7e1b5ff17be0548f535bc3947948a: Then let's get to work. First, you can't deny this time that the human is of no further use to us.
textByHashes.8276d906db7046a645599110a06c584cff3316e8: Says who? You? You don't command me! Do you think you're my lord? Or maybe you think you're my father?
textByHashes.7389dececb088850ab9729031bcf9a8cafc09507: No. I'll go with the human. You wait here.
textByHashes.83069c3f08af7463b207b050c1bfd8e44c70185d: No. Just some cheap parlour trick. He's likely still nearby.
textByHashes.7d7650fb6f7bcbcc45adfa062720294ed31e9d88: We should, but first, you have some explaining to do. You knew him.
textByHashes.c28b70a1810242d96ecf220919fdd97b8f6356c9: Ah, so you were always a fool?
textByHashes.e673fd739d9d060acc9e392ce5e37102ea717110: And there you go aptly proving my point. As it seems I have to explain everything, this door leads to the prison Hazeel spoke of earlier.
textByHashes.1f01a6d56130f0d4f32735a3941f8fb52606d9b7: Your friend is likely the culprit in our little murder mystery, or at least, is working with the one responsible.
textByHashes.156a4a9056d713c5fb5dcabad70e9c180a7a2db6: And let us hope it stays that way. Now, I will stay here and guard the door in case your friend returns. Go and tell Hazeel what happened. Now.
textByHashes.b6f960460f29d4bf21431dea0b18d3990abc9b93: Why are you here? Go and tell Hazeel what happened. Now.
textByHashes.e0bdca88707b229f52af9ae7a099cd45d283c91e: No. I assume Hazeel has given you a job to do? Go get it done and leave me in peace.
textByHashes.ff5587066d5cdd0bfc09fb6f22a2ff34111f70dd: It seems your friend has quite the range of abilities. He used the Shadow Realm.
textByHashes.296becafe1e17aa895bcfe80b32fd3259d7acfab: I can have a detachment of soldiers despatched here at once. We'll need to keep things light to ensure the trolls don't notice our work. Not to mention our kin...
textByHashes.c54c4521c31f014ddd40f0b5f8e35be04f37d794: You can see into the Shadow Realm and yet you are not of it. Oh well, you will be of no use.
textByHashes.9fb09fdd99d97d4c19be5ba253ae361ca827d57d: Your form is still solid. To be of the Shadow Realm you must be less opaque.
textByHashes.f54164121da240a3b43f343e904ce0fbe104b19b: What? You are not dead and yet you walk and talk in the Shadow Realm. Explain yourself.
textByHashes.80e7c700fc5fa48f2c74bf3c4d3e25202e5bf8f7: This intrigues me. How do you know me? You look familiar but I can't place it.
textByHashes.155feba4a6e2747657fb113be34c5e33cb46045b: There are ways to see that you humans cannot grasp.
textByHashes.42fd05fe1603615765baa2fb8f01b27846ff13ed: It doesn't matter anyway. You are not of the blood and I cannot trust you.
textByHashes.da96261f7e5828192d275166798f2a7f4e8a7f10: That is not something I can take your word on.
textByHashes.4a248c299dc8535b8bea39d3e787066768c8198d: Hmm... There is one person's word I would believe. If you visited the Sin Seer, and she judged you trustworthy, then I would have use for you.
textByHashes.7855bf93abfa8fb12a5dde60403a5ac14826c1f8: Well, considering I told you she was a seer, of sorts, I would imagine you would find her in Seers' Village. It is to the south of here, not far.
textByHashes.5f96b1c15556d64c2f296ea5c7f61146ff901fe1: Go and see her, return with her report and I will see if I have use for you. You will be well rewarded.
textByHashes.ebbcdec6741755a153c752642ecf1b2b39988443: It's a long story, and I do not have the time to tell it.
textByHashes.45e343dd258a780012fe9913e6094063d14c1412: True, I never can tell you humans apart. You're all ugly creatures, anyway.
textByHashes.2494e1865b184c4f2b5bb93c7eb4543a8d615588: You goldfish! Go find the Sin Seer - she will determine if you are trustworthy. She lives in Seers' Village to the south of here.
textByHashes.04596723dfb6a6446400daa4e8ad01473c150436: Well, you'd best go get another one! Be off with you!
textByHashes.f16fdc165c11d39765435357a54b76b6b33fbebc: The note says you have committed many sins and atrocities in your life. I'm impressed; I will use you.
textByHashes.721ab6ea95df513dd0bdfaceeb6cddb7af36d8c6: It has been a long time since I have left my home in the south. I have lost track of what is going on in the world, but now it is imperative that I know.
textByHashes.249974106a902c100d19ad01a4595922e42605de: So, I sent out four scouts to gather information for me. I brought them to walk like me in the Shadow Realm, so they would be safe from my enemies.
textByHashes.ef465b1bf09e62f9f9c942a856c6e45e68e4d4d3: I sent them on four missions. One was to go to the land of the gnomes and explore their holdings. One was to go to a jungle to the south. One was to explore where the White Knights rule. And one to the place that
textByHashes.35149277f3558e23a05334f8fdd8e9cd6ce2348b: I once called home - a place of great heat.
textByHashes.feddfa214783f4136c0d91b157447eecdfb55cff: I am going to entrust you with a very important message, which you must deliver to each one of them.
textByHashes.6e0c0da6dc252cc66ca8227952111adf3ac74e50: Tell them: The planets are nearing alignment; we will meet in the place of half light and ice soon. Beware of the others, for though they are weak and few, they are cunning.
textByHashes.f179ed615dd03e4a972a2e0737173f939e632135: Do you make progress in finding my scouts?
textByHashes.11cdbdb0e8b25299d04b3e30e22ebf1dcc422fed: One was to go to a jungle to the south.
textByHashes.4bbd01a8d2b6210b926fae22612cb98366c892d3: One was to go to the land of the gnomes and explore their holdings.
textByHashes.70bc9b3a773cdccc3bd6f4fd086b4f5035a2e69e: One was to explore where the White Knights rule.
textByHashes.c61549dffb343a68fdd3ae1df063af1927c6d564: One was to go to a place of great heat.
textByHashes.273ada1e6a8247f3d53ce442e72ffdbaecfe642b: If I knew more of their locations I would go myself. Now go and finish the job.
textByHashes.68f82f3ba5e1f266b63a31b682a60ede91846a08: Oh, and what did he say that for?
textByHashes.204ac7ea9fde2903c6494258f6c80e206d2d752b: Ah. Interesting. Well, you have served your purpose. Now to award you with something appropriate.
textByHashes.e326c530c9af5e945cd8331d42c7bb1c24afa779: There is a cave near where the fish-men gather. Go to the east branch of this cave and seek out one who lives in the Shadow Realm. He will reward you well.
textByHashes.c17825690ac606723110ce824c2a96ce3109534f: Wait! Take this, it is the key to your reward.
textByHashes.e36a558b93a42305a116154aa3f3dc8a9cccc2eb: You do not have enough space for it. Speak to me again when you do.
textByHashes.484c832d47c0c7b44b99e44192bc02718d548234: Ah, you have dealt with severed limbs before?
textByHashes.92f6b4c8967082664154d465acc97b2ef6a484a4: Don't worry if you lose it, I can always get more to replace it.
textByHashes.4f01143aae372301b78c5336323ae17298100fd8: There is a cave near where the fish-men gather. Go there and seek out one who lives in the Shadow Realm. He will reward you well.
textByHashes.04752c84895c1ea4ae146d9a1845d8841b73c8a6: You already have one. What use could you have for two?
textByHashes.ef118b89e82cee9b6bf1cef0e8de370ffa0985cb: Here, take another. They are easy to come by.
textByHashes.935b5f880b95eb50462a5e9e675d383e0de9898a: He was angry that you killed him. Quite natural, really.
textByHashes.4fe0dfc4caf4e2ed577711f060e93f989027e2fe: Now get out of here, you filthy skinbag. I will not waste my time on you.
